subject: english
learning_objectives: Read and understand a passage on business
Identify key details about PZ Cussons

sections.heading: Passage
sections.content:
The passage centres on the establishment of PZ Cussons and its gradual growth in the nineteenth century.
It was formerly known as PZ until 1975 when it acquired Cussons.
In 2002, it was renamed PZ Cussons to underline its core product range.
Today, PZ Cussons is a leading public company with interests worldwide.
